sentences.translation: Hodanje je jednostavan i koristan sport za sve.
sentences.translationEn: Walking is a simple and beneficial exercise for everyone.

sentences.arabic: أَمْشِي فِي الْحَدِيقَةِ لِمُدَّةِ ثَلَاثِينَ دَقِيقَةً كُلَّ صَبَاحٍ.
sentences.translation: Šetam u parku trideset minuta svako jutro.
sentences.translationEn: I walk in the park for thirty minutes every morning.

sentences.arabic: التَّمَارِينُ الرِّيَاضِيَّةُ تُقَوِّي الْقَلْبَ وَتُحَسِّنُ الْمِزَاجَ.
sentences.translation: Tjelesne vježbe jačaju srce i popravljaju raspoloženje.
sentences.translationEn: Physical exercises strengthen the heart and improve the mood.
